item.title: How Much is an Emergency Vet Visit?
item.description: Money's guide of how much is an emergency vet visit.

item.title: Research Finds Guaranteed Income in Retirement Can Actually Help You Live Longer
item.description: Guaranteed income in retirement may reduce stress and help retirees live longer, study suggests.

item.title: What Happens If You Owe the IRS Thousands of Dollars
item.description: Penalties and interest can add up quickly.

item.description: What you want to manage is sequence-of-returns risk, or the danger of a market downturn occurring shortly after retiring and forcing you to prematurel...

item.title: How Much Does It Cost to Refinance a Mortgage?
item.description: Part of determining if a mortgage refinance is practical is weighing the balance between its benefits and costs.
